target:
# The browser can't connect but curl can - likely a proxy/DNS issue for playwright
# Let's use curl directly to fetch archived pages
curl -s --max-time 30 -L "https://web.archive.org/web/20091201000000*/http://www.cakepoker.com/" 2>&1 | grep -o 'href="[^"]*cakepoker[^"]*screenshot[^"]*"' | head -20
